titleStmt.title: SII 19.393: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 393. (A.R. No. 328 of 1910.) TIRUMEYJÑĀNAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, JÑĀNAPARAMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription is damaged in places. It records the sale with exemption of taxes of an areca-garden for 40 kaḻañju of gold and of a wet land for 13 kaḻañju, by the mahāsabhā of Ārūrchchēri a brahmadēya in Tirunāṟaiyūr-nāḍu to the temple of Tirumayānattudēvar at Nālūr. Mention is made of an areca-garden belonging to a temple of god [Śam]parēśvarattudēva, as one of the boundaries of the former. This is probably a record of the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam Ārūrcceri mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom ceṟ deyam nālūrt tiru mayāṉattu lai Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭu tavar kamukantoṭṭamāṉa kamukantoṭṭattukkellai kiḻpāṟk reśvattu tevar nilattukkum It tevar kamukantoṭṭattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai peruṅkāl niroṭukālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai śampareśvattutevar kamukantoṭṭattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Iārūrcceri Ūrnatta key ḻikkut teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilam kaṉṟuṅ ṟum Āṟiṭupaṭukaiyumuṭpaṭa Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Iññāṉkellaiyilu mukantoṭṭa muṟṟum cantrātittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyākac ceytukuṭuttu sabhaiyoṅ koṇṭa poṉ tiyppokku ṭuveṭṭic cūṭa karuttu kāyttu patu paḻaṅkāciṉoṭu rai� ppatu Ūrk kallāl koṇṭa poṉ 4 10� Ippoṉ nāṟpatiṉkaḻai Ipparicu kaiyyi ley koṇṭu yiliyākac ceytu tom tirumayāṉamuṭaiya paramasvāmikku Ārurc
pperuṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Iṉṉam Ittevarkkey Iṟaiyiliyāka varkaḷ ceytukuṭutta nila pparalaiyiṉ vaṭakkil Aiññūṟṟuvamayakka kku Ellai Ūrarinta perunā ḻpāṟkellai kaviṇiyaṉ Araṅkaṉ māta navaṉitāyan sabhainokkik kiṭanta nilattukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai makavāyiṉ ṉiroṭukālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai ceṟṟūrt tirumuttirukkoyiṟ tevar nilattukku vaṭapāṟkellai Āḻiyvāykā ṭu kālukkut teṟkkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilam vāykkūṟṟup peruvaḻi vanta Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi ṟamai Ūroṭuṅ kalanta nirnilam pattu Ippattum Ēṟṟaikkum cantrātittava ceytukuṭuttuk koṇṭa poṉ ṟuḷaiy 10 3� Ippoṉ patiṉmukkaḻaiñcum koṇṭu cantrātittaval kuṭuttom I sabhaiyom Āka(ka) Ikkamukattoṭṭamum I ṟaiili ceytukuṭut Ippoṉ mukkaḻai koṇṭu cantrādittaval Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭuttom Ittirumayāṉattup paramasvāmikku sabhai ṅkuṟip panmāhe
Digital edition of SII 19.393 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
